title: English conversation roadmap
intro: Goal: hold easy, natural conversations with people from other countries.

stages.title: Everyday conversation
stages.goal: Survive simple daily situations in English.

steps.title: Greetings & small talk
steps.detail: Hi / How are you? / Nice to meet you / What do you do?

steps.title: Talk about yourself
steps.detail: Name, job, hobbies, where you're from.

steps.title: Ask simple questions
steps.detail: Where / when / how much / can you…?

stages.title: Fluency builders
stages.goal: Say the same idea in more than one way.

steps.title: Paraphrasing
steps.detail: Practice 3 ways to say each phrase (see Expressions).

steps.title: Give opinions
steps.detail: I think… / In my opinion… / I'd say…

steps.title: Fix mistakes naturally
steps.detail: Review the Mistakes page; avoid repeats.
